papers.title: Taming the Entropy Cliff: Variable Codebook Size Quantization for Autoregressive Visual Generation
papers.abstract: Most discrete visual tokenizers rely on a default design: every position in the sequence shares the same codebook. Researchers try to scale the codebook size $K$ to get better reconstruction performance. Such a constant-codebook design hits a fundamental information-theoretic limit. We observe that the per-position conditional entropy of the training set decays so quickly along the sequence that, after a few positions, the conditional distribution becomes essentially deterministic. On ImageNet with $K=16384$, this happens within only 2 out of 256 positions, turning the remaining 254 into a memorization problem. We call this phenomenon the Entropy Cliff and formalize it with a simple expression: $t^{*} = \lceil \log_2 N / \log_2 K \rceil$. Interestingly, this phenomenon is not observed in language, as its natural structure keeps the effective entropy per position well below the codebook capacity. To address this, we propose Variable Codebook Size Quantization (VCQ), where the codebook size $K_t$ grows monotonically along the sequence from $K_{\min}=2$ to $K_{\max}$, leaving the loss function, parameter count, and AR training procedure unchanged. With a vanilla autoregressive Transformer and standard next-token prediction, a base version of VCQ reduces gFID w/o CFG from 27.98 to 14.80 on ImageNet $256\times256$ over the baseline. Scaled up, it reaches gFID 1.71 with 684M autoregressive parameters, without any extra training techniques such as semantic regularization or causal alignment. The extreme information bottleneck at $K_{\min}=2$ naturally induces a coarse-to-fine semantic hierarchy: a linear probe on only the first 10 tokens reaches 43.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, compared to 27.1% for uniform codebooks. Ultimately, these results show that what matters is not only the total capacity of the codebook, but also how that capacity is distributed and organized.

analysis.tldr: 提出变长码本量化（VCQ），通过沿序列单调增加码本大小解决视觉自回归生成中的熵悬崖问题，显著提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 离散视觉分词器默认所有位置共享相同码本，但图像序列中条件熵快速衰减，导致大部分位置变成记忆问题，限制了生成性能。
analysis.problem: 固定码本大小设计在视觉自回归生成中遭遇信息论极限，即熵悬崖现象，需要更高效的码本容量分配策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到图像序列中条件熵沿位置快速衰减，在ImageNet上K=16384时仅2个位置后分布几乎确定，剩余254个位置成为记忆问题，并形式化为t* = ceil(log2 N / log2 K)。该现象在语言中不出现。
analysis.method: 提出变长码本量化（VCQ），码本大小K_t沿序列从K_min=2单调增长至K_max，保持损失函数、参数数量和自回归训练过程不变。
contributions: 发现并形式化了视觉自回归生成中的熵悬崖现象
提出VCQ方法，通过变长码本分配容量，显著提升生成质量
实验表明极小的初始码本自然诱导粗到细的语义层次，前10个token的线性探针达到43.8% top-1准确率
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256上，基础版VCQ将gFID（无CFG）从27.98降至14.80；扩展至684M参数时达到gFID 1.71，无需语义正则化或因果对齐等额外技术。
limitations: 方法在图像生成上验证，未在视频或其他模态测试
码本大小增长策略可能需针对不同数据集调整
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出变长码本量化（VCQ），通过沿序列单调增加码本大小解决视觉自回归生成中的熵悬崖问题，显著提升生成质量。

papers.title: Bridging visual saliency and large language models for explainable deep learning in medical imaging
papers.abstract: The opaque nature of deep learning models remains a significant barrier to their clinical adoption in medical imaging. This paper presents a multimodal explainability framework that bridges the gap between convolutional neural network (CNN) predictions and clinically actionable insights for brain tumor classification, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to deliver human-interpretable diagnostic narratives. The proposed framework operates through three coupled stages. First, nine CNN architectures are extended with a dual-output hybrid formulation that simultaneously optimises a classification head and a segmentation head, enabling spatially richer feature learning. Second, visual saliency attribution methods, namely Grad-CAM, Grad-CAM++, and ScoreCAM, are applied to generate class-discriminative heatmaps, which are subsequently refined into binary tumor masks via an adaptive percentile thresholding pipeline. Third, the resulting masks are mapped onto the Harvard-Oxford cortical atlas to translate pixel-level evidence into named neuroanatomical structures, and the extracted findings are encoded into a structured JSON file that conditions three LLMs (Grok3, Mistral, and LLaMA) to generate coherent, radiological-style diagnostic reports. Evaluated on a dataset of 4,834 contrast-enhanced T1-weighted brain MRI images spanning three tumor classes, InceptionResNetV2 achieved the highest classification performance and Grad-CAM++ yielded the best segmentation overlap. Among the language models, Grok3 led in lexical diversity and coherence, while LLaMA achieved the highest readability score. By integrating visual, anatomical, and linguistic modalities into a unified pipeline, the framework produces explanations that are technically grounded and meaningfully interpretable, advancing the transparency and clinical accountability of artificial intelligence assisted brain tumor diagnosis.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态可解释性框架，结合CNN、视觉显著性图与LLM生成脑肿瘤诊断报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在医学影像中的黑箱特性阻碍了临床采纳，需要可解释的方法来提供临床可操作的诊断依据。
analysis.problem: 如何将CNN预测转化为人类可理解的诊断叙述，弥合模型输出与临床决策之间的可解释性鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：1) 九种CNN架构扩展为双输出（分类+分割）；2) 视觉显著性方法（Grad-CAM等）生成热图并二值化为肿瘤掩膜；3) 掩膜映射到哈佛-牛津皮层图谱，提取结构信息编码为JSON，输入LLM（Grok3、Mistral、LLaMA）生成放射学风格报告。
contributions: 提出结合CNN、显著性图与LLM的多模态可解释性框架
通过解剖图谱映射和结构化JSON编码实现像素级证据到临床叙述的转化
analysis.experiments: 在4,834张增强T1加权脑MRI图像上评估，InceptionResNetV2分类最优，Grad-CAM++分割最佳；Grok3词汇多样性和连贯性领先，LLaMA可读性最高。
limitations: 仅针对脑肿瘤分类，泛化性待验证
依赖预定义解剖图谱，可能不适用于非标准解剖结构
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态可解释性框架，结合CNN、视觉显著性图与LLM生成脑肿瘤诊断报告。

papers.title: EA-WM: Event-Aware Generative World Model with Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields
papers.abstract: Pretrained video diffusion models provide powerful spatiotemporal generative priors, making them a natural foundation for robotic world models. While recent world-action models jointly optimize future videos and actions, they predominantly treat video generation as an auxiliary representation for policy learning. Consequently, they insufficiently explore the inverse problem: leveraging action signals to guide video synthesis, thereby often failing to preserve precise robot spatial geometry and fine-grained robot-object interaction dynamics in the generated rollouts. To bridge this gap, we present EA-WM, an Event-Aware Generative World Model that effectively closes the loop between kinematic control and visual perception. Rather than injecting joint or end-effector actions as abstract, low-dimensional tokens, EA-WM projects actions and kinematic states directly into the target camera view as Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields. To fully exploit this geometrically grounded representation, we introduce event-aware bidirectional fusion blocks that modulate cross-branch attention, capturing object state changes and interaction dynamics. Evaluated on the comprehensive WorldArena benchmark, EA-WM achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing baselines by a significant margin.

analysis.tldr: EA-WM通过结构化运动-视觉动作场和事件感知融合，提升了机器人世界模型在视频生成中的几何精度与交互动态保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界-动作模型将视频生成视为策略学习的辅助表示，未能充分利用动作信号引导视频合成，导致生成轨迹中机器人空间几何和细粒度交互动态的保真度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用动作信号有效引导视频合成，以在生成的世界模型 rollout 中精确保持机器人空间几何和机器人-物体交互动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EA-WM，将动作和运动状态投影到目标相机视图形成结构化运动-视觉动作场，并引入事件感知双向融合块调制跨分支注意力以捕捉物体状态变化和交互动态。
contributions: 提出结构化运动-视觉动作场，将动作和运动状态投影到相机视图，提供几何有意义的表示。
引入事件感知双向融合块，通过调制跨分支注意力捕捉物体状态变化和交互动态。
在WorldArena基准上达到最先进性能，显著超越现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在WorldArena基准上评估，EA-WM达到最先进性能，显著超越现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定相机视图和运动状态表示，泛化性需进一步验证。
事件感知融合块的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EA-WM通过结构化运动-视觉动作场和事件感知融合，提升了机器人世界模型在视频生成中的几何精度与交互动态保真度。

papers.title: SuperFace: Preference-Aligned Facial Expression Estimation Beyond Pseudo Supervision
papers.abstract: Accurate facial estimation is crucial for realistic digital human animation, and ARKit blendshape coefficients offer an interpretable representation by mapping facial motions to semantic animation controls. However, learning high-quality ARKit coefficient prediction remains limited by the absence of reliable ground-truth supervision. Existing methods typically rely on capture software such as Live Link Face to provide pseudo labels, which may contain noisy activations, biased coefficient magnitudes, and missing or inaccurate facial actions. Consequently, models trained with supervised learning tend to reproduce imperfect pseudo labels rather than optimize for perceptual expression fidelity. In this paper, we propose SuperFace, a preference-driven framework that moves ARKit facial expression estimation from pseudo-label imitation toward human-aligned perceptual optimization. Instead of treating software-estimated coefficients as fixed ground truth, SuperFace uses them only as an initialization and further improves coefficient prediction through human preference feedback on rendered facial expressions. By aligning the model with perceptual judgments rather than numerical pseudo labels, SuperFace enables more visually faithful and expressive facial animation. Experiments show that SuperFace improves expression fidelity over Live Link Face supervision, demonstrating the effectiveness of preference-driven optimization for semantic facial action prediction.

analysis.tldr: SuperFace 通过人类偏好反馈优化 ARKit 面部表情系数预测，超越伪标签监督。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 ARKit 系数预测依赖 Live Link Face 等软件提供的伪标签，这些标签存在噪声激活、系数偏差和动作缺失，导致模型学习到不完美的伪标签而非感知级表情保真度。
analysis.problem: 如何从伪标签模仿转向人类对齐的感知优化，提升 ARKit 面部表情系数预测的视觉保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 伪标签存在噪声激活、系数幅度偏差、缺失或不准确的面部动作，监督学习模型会复现这些不完美标签。
analysis.method: 提出 SuperFace，一种偏好驱动框架：将软件估计系数作为初始化，通过人类对渲染面部表情的偏好反馈进一步优化系数预测，实现感知对齐。
contributions: 提出偏好驱动的 ARKit 面部表情估计框架，超越伪标签监督。
通过人类偏好反馈优化系数预测，提升表情视觉保真度。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明 SuperFace 在表情保真度上优于 Live Link Face 监督，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖人类偏好反馈收集，可能成本较高。
未讨论跨种族、跨文化表情的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SuperFace 通过人类偏好反馈优化 ARKit 面部表情系数预测，超越伪标签监督。

papers.title: Retina-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language Modeling for Joint Retinal Diagnosis and Clinical Report Generation
papers.abstract: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness among working-age adults worldwide, yet most automated screening systems are limited to image-level classification and lack clinically structured reporting. We propose Retina-RAG, a low-cost modular framework that jointly performs DR severity grading, macular edema (ME) detection, and report generation. The architecture decouples a high-performance retinal classifier and a parameter-efficient vision-language model (Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) adapted via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), enabling flexible component integration. A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) module injects curated ophthalmic knowledge together with structured classifier outputs at inference time to improve diagnostic consistency and reduce hallucinations. Retina-RAG achieves an F1-score of 0.731 for DR grading and 0.948 for ME detection, substantially outperforming zero-shot Qwen (0.096, 0.732) and MMed-RAG (0.541, 0.641) on a retinal disease detection dataset with captions. For report generation, Retina-RAG attains ROUGE-L 0.438 and SBERT similarity 0.884, exceeding all baselines. The full framework operates on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating that clinically structured retinal AI can be achieved with modest computational resources.

analysis.tldr: Retina-RAG 通过检索增强生成和轻量级视觉语言模型，在单 GPU 上实现糖尿病视网膜病变分级、黄斑水肿检测和临床报告生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有糖尿病视网膜病变筛查系统多限于图像级分类，缺乏临床结构化报告生成能力，且高精度模型通常计算资源需求大。
analysis.problem: 如何以低计算成本实现联合视网膜疾病分级、检测和结构化临床报告生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本视觉语言模型在视网膜诊断任务上表现较差（如 Qwen2.5-VL 的 DR 分级 F1 仅 0.096），而检索增强生成可有效提升诊断一致性和减少幻觉。
analysis.method: 将高性能视网膜分类器与基于 LoRA 微调的 Qwen2.5-VL-7B 视觉语言模型解耦，并在推理时通过 RAG 模块注入结构化分类器输出和眼科学知识。
contributions: 提出 Retina-RAG 模块化框架，联合实现 DR 分级、ME 检测和报告生成。
在单消费级 GPU 上达到临床级性能，DR 分级 F1 0.731，ME 检测 F1 0.948，报告生成 ROUGE-L 0.438。
analysis.experiments: 在带标注的视网膜疾病数据集上评估，与零样本 Qwen2.5-VL 和 MMed-RAG 对比，Retina-RAG 在所有指标上显著领先。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和知识库，泛化性需进一步验证。
报告生成质量可能受限于 RAG 检索知识的覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Retina-RAG 通过检索增强生成和轻量级视觉语言模型，在单 GPU 上实现糖尿病视网膜病变分级、黄斑水肿检测和临床报告生成。

papers.title: DynT2I-Eval: A Dynamic Evaluation Framework for Text-to-Image Models
papers.abstract: Existing text-to-image (T2I) benchmarks largely rely on fixed prompt sets, leaving them vulnerable to overfitting and benchmark contamination once publicly released and repeatedly reused. In this work, we propose DynT2I-Eval, a fully automated dynamic evaluation framework for T2I models. It constructs a structured visual semantic space from long-form descriptions, decomposing prompts into controllable dimensions (e.g., subject, logical constraint, environment, and composition). This enables the continuous generation of fresh prompts via task-specific spaces and difficulty-aware sampling. DynT2I-Eval evaluates model performance across text alignment, perceptual quality, and aesthetics. Heterogeneous outputs are unified into prompt-conditioned pairwise comparisons, allowing a dynamic scheduler, micro-batch aggregation, and weighted Bayesian updates to maintain a stable online leaderboard despite changing prompt distributions and model injection. Experiments with independently sampled prompt streams demonstrate that continually refreshed prompts provide a robust evaluation protocol, reducing the impact of prompt-set-specific tuning. Simulations and ablations further confirm that the proposed ranking framework achieves a strong balance among cold-start convergence, late-entry discovery, and long-run ranking fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态评估框架DynT2I-Eval，通过结构化视觉语义空间持续生成新提示，避免文本到图像模型评估中的过拟合与基准污染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像基准依赖固定提示集，易受过度拟合和基准污染影响，一旦公开重复使用后评估结果不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能持续生成新提示、避免基准污染且稳定排名的动态评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定提示集导致模型针对特定提示调优，降低评估泛化性；公开后反复使用引发基准污染。
analysis.method: 从长描述构建结构化视觉语义空间，将提示分解为可控维度（如主体、逻辑约束、环境、组合），通过任务特定空间和难度感知采样持续生成新提示；采用提示条件成对比较、动态调度器、微批聚合和加权贝叶斯更新维护在线排行榜。
contributions: 提出首个全自动动态评估框架DynT2I-Eval，持续生成新提示以抵抗过拟合和基准污染。
设计结构化视觉语义空间和难度感知采样，实现可控提示生成。
提出基于成对比较和贝叶斯更新的在线排名机制，平衡冷启动收敛、新模型发现和长期排名保真度。
analysis.experiments: 使用独立采样的提示流进行实验，模拟和消融研究验证排名框架在冷启动收敛、后期模型发现和长期排名保真度上的平衡。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 框架依赖长描述构建视觉语义空间，可能不适用于短提示场景。
动态排名机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态评估框架DynT2I-Eval，通过结构化视觉语义空间持续生成新提示，避免文本到图像模型评估中的过拟合与基准污染。

papers.title: Beyond Forgetting in Continual Medical Image Segmentation: A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
papers.abstract: Continual learning (CL) is essential for deploying medical image segmentation models in clinical environments where imaging domains, anatomical targets, and diagnostic tasks evolve over time. However, continual segmentation still faces three main challenges. First, the scenarios for this task remain insufficiently standardized for real-world clinical settings. Second, existing research has been primarily focused on mitigating forgetting, overlooking the other essential properties such as plasticity. Third, a benchmark work with comprehensive evaluation on existing methods is stll desirable. To address these gaps, we present such benchmark study of continual medical image segmentation. We first define three clinically motivated scenarios, namely Domain-CL, Class-CL, and Organ-CL, to respectively capture the cross-center domain shift, the incremental anatomical structure segmentation, and the cross-organ segmentation. We then introduce an evaluation framework that measures not only general performance and forgetting, but also plasticity, forward generalizability, parameter efficiency, and replay burden. The results, from extensive experiments with representative CL methods, showed that it was still challenging to develop a model that could satisfy all the requirements simultaneously. Nevertheless, these studies also suggested that the replay-based methods achieve the best overall balance between stability and plasticity, the parameter-isolation methods should be effective at reducing forgetting, though at the cost of increased model size, and the forward generalizability remain a significantly understudied aspect of this research field. Finally, we discuss related learning paradigms and outline future directions for continual medical image segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出持续医学图像分割的基准研究，定义三个临床场景并引入多维度评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习对医学图像分割在临床部署中至关重要，但现有研究场景不标准化、过度关注遗忘而忽视塑性，且缺乏综合基准。
analysis.problem: 解决持续医学图像分割中场景标准化不足、评估维度单一（仅关注遗忘）以及缺乏全面方法比较的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明：基于重放的方法在稳定性和塑性之间取得最佳平衡；参数隔离方法能有效减少遗忘但增加模型大小；前向泛化能力是显著未被充分研究的方面。
analysis.method: 定义三个临床场景（Domain-CL、Class-CL、Organ-CL），并引入评估框架衡量通用性能、遗忘、塑性、前向泛化性、参数效率和重放负担。
contributions: 定义了三个临床驱动的持续医学图像分割场景
提出了包含塑性、前向泛化性等多维度的评估框架
通过大量实验揭示了现有方法的优缺点及未来方向
analysis.experiments: 在多个代表性持续学习方法上进行广泛实验，评估了通用性能、遗忘、塑性、前向泛化性、参数效率和重放负担。
limitations: 未提供具体数据集和实验数值结果
可能未覆盖所有临床场景或方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出持续医学图像分割的基准研究，定义三个临床场景并引入多维度评估框架。

papers.title: Learning Discrete Autoregressive Priors with Wasserstein Gradient Flow
papers.abstract: Discrete image tokenizers are commonly trained in two stages: first for reconstruction, and then with a prior model fitted to the frozen token sequences. This decoupling leaves the tokenizer unaware of the model that will later generate its tokens. As a result, the learned tokens may preserve image information well but still be difficult for an autoregressive (AR) prior to predict from left to right. We analyze this mismatch using Tripartite Variational Consistency (TVC), which decomposes latent-variable learning into three consistency conditions: conditional-likelihood consistency, prior consistency, and posterior consistency. TVC shows that two-stage training preserves the reconstruction side but leaves prior consistency outside the tokenizer objective: the overall token distribution is fixed before the AR prior participates in training. Motivated by this view, we add a distribution-level prior-matching signal during tokenizer training, while keeping the reconstruction objective unchanged. We optimize this signal with a Wasserstein-gradient-flow update. For hard categorical tokens, the update reduces to a token-level contrast between an auxiliary AR model that tracks the tokenizer's current token distribution and the target AR prior. It requires only forward passes through the two AR models and does not backpropagate through either of them. The resulting tokenizer, wAR-Tok, reduces AR loss and improves generation FID on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet at comparable reconstruction quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出 wAR-Tok，在离散图像分词器训练中加入分布级先验匹配信号，通过 Wasserstein 梯度流优化，使分词器感知后续自回归先验，降低 AR 损失并提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有离散图像分词器采用两阶段训练（先重建，后拟合先验），导致分词器对后续自回归先验不可知，学到的 token 虽保留图像信息但难以被 AR 模型从左到右预测，存在先验不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 解决两阶段训练中分词器与自回归先验之间的先验不一致问题，使分词器在训练时感知后续 AR 先验，从而降低 AR 损失并提升生成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过三变量变分一致性（TVC）分析，发现两阶段训练仅保证了重建侧的一致性，而先验一致性未被纳入分词器目标：整体 token 分布在 AR 先验参与训练前就已固定。
analysis.method: 在分词器训练中加入分布级先验匹配信号，使用 Wasserstein 梯度流更新；对于硬类别 token，更新简化为辅助 AR 模型（跟踪当前 token 分布）与目标 AR 先验之间的 token 级对比，仅需前向传播，无需反向传播。
contributions: 提出 wAR-Tok，一种通过 Wasserstein 梯度流将先验匹配信号融入离散图像分词器训练的方法。
从三变量变分一致性角度分析了两阶段训练的先验不一致问题，并提供了理论动机。
在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上验证了 wAR-Tok 能降低 AR 损失并改善生成 FID，且重建质量相当。
analysis.experiments: 在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上评估，wAR-Tok 降低了 AR 损失并改善了生成 FID，同时重建质量与基线相当。
limitations: 可能仅适用于离散图像 tokenizer，未验证其他模态。
辅助 AR 模型增加了训练计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 wAR-Tok，在离散图像分词器训练中加入分布级先验匹配信号，通过 Wasserstein 梯度流优化，使分词器感知后续自回归先验，降低 AR 损失并提升生成质量。

papers.title: AI-Generated Images: What Humans and Machines See When They Look at the Same Image
papers.abstract: The misuse of generative AI in online disinformation campaigns highlights the urgent need for transparent and explainable detection systems. In this work, we investigate how detectors for AI-generated images can be more effective in providing human-understandable explanations for their predictions. To this end, we develop a suite of detectors with various architectures and fine-tuning strategies, trained on our large-scale photorealistic fake image dataset, AIText2Image, and assess their performance on state-of-the-art text-to-image AI generators. We integrate 16 different explainable AI (XAI) methods into our detection framework, and the visual explanations are comprehensively refined and evaluated through a novel approach that prioritizes human understanding of AI-generated images, using both textual and visual responses collected from a survey of 100 participants. This framework offers insights into visual-language cues in fake image detection and into the clarity of XAI methods from a human perspective, measuring the alignment of XAI outputs with human preferences.

analysis.tldr: 研究AI生成图像检测器的可解释性，通过人类调查评估XAI方法与人类视觉理解的匹配度。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI被滥用于虚假信息传播，现有检测系统缺乏透明且可解释的预测机制，难以让人类理解检测依据。
analysis.problem: 如何使AI生成图像检测器提供符合人类认知的可解释性输出，并量化XAI方法与人类视觉理解的匹配度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建多种架构和微调策略的检测器，集成16种XAI方法，通过100名参与者的调查收集文本和视觉反馈，提出优先考虑人类理解的评估框架。
contributions: 构建大规模逼真假图数据集AIText2Image
提出基于人类调查的XAI方法评估框架，量化XAI输出与人类偏好的对齐程度

papers.title: Autoregressive Visual Generation Needs a Prologue
papers.abstract: In this work, we propose Prologue, an approach to bridging the reconstruction-generation gap in autoregressive (AR) image generation. Instead of modifying visual tokens to satisfy both reconstruction and generation, Prologue generates a small set of prologue tokens prepended to the visual token sequence. These prologue tokens are trained exclusively with the AR cross-entropy (CE) loss, while visual tokens remain dedicated to reconstruction. This decoupled design lets us optimize generation through the AR model's true distribution without affecting reconstruction quality, which we further formalize from an ELBO perspective. On ImageNet 256x256, Prologue-Base reduces gFID from 21.01 to 10.75 without classifier-free guidance while keeping reconstruction almost unchanged; Prologue-Large reaches a competitive rFID of 0.99 and gFID of 1.46 using a standard AR model without auxiliary semantic supervision. Interestingly, driven only by AR gradients, prologue tokens exhibit emergent semantic structure: linear probing on 16 prologue tokens reaches 35.88% Top-1, far above the 23.71% of the first 16 tokens from a standard tokenizer; resampling with fixed prologue tokens preserves a similar high-level semantic layout. Our results suggest a new direction: generation quality can be improved by introducing a separate learned generative representation while leaving the original representation intact.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prologue方法，通过添加独立的前言令牌弥合自回归图像生成中的重建-生成差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归图像生成中，视觉令牌需同时兼顾重建和生成，导致两者性能难以兼得，存在重建-生成差距。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲重建质量的前提下，提升自回归图像生成的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 生成少量前言令牌（prologue tokens）附加到视觉令牌序列前，前言令牌仅用自回归交叉熵损失训练，视觉令牌专用于重建，实现解耦设计。
contributions: 提出Prologue方法，通过解耦重建和生成任务，有效缩小重建-生成差距。
在ImageNet 256x256上，Prologue-Base将gFID从21.01降至10.75（无无分类器引导），Prologue-Large达到rFID 0.99和gFID 1.46。
发现前言令牌在仅受自回归梯度驱动下涌现语义结构，线性探测Top-1达35.88%，远高于标准令牌的23.71%。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256数据集上评估，报告了gFID、rFID等指标，并与基线对比。
limitations: 可能仅适用于自回归图像生成范式，对其他生成模型（如扩散模型）的适用性未知。

papers.title: Continuous Expert Assembly: Instance-Conditioned Low-Rank Residuals for All-in-One Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Real-world image degradation is often unknown, spatially non-uniform, and compositional, requiring all-in-one restoration models to adapt a single set of weights to diverse local corruption patterns without test-time degradation labels. Existing methods typically modulate a shared backbone with global prompts or degradation descriptors, or route features through predefined expert pools. However, compact global conditioning can bottleneck localized degradation evidence, while static expert routing may produce homogeneous updates or rely on unstable sparse assignments. We propose \textbf{Continuous Expert Assembly} (CEA), a token-wise dynamic parameterization framework for all-in-one image restoration. CEA employs a lightweight \textbf{Cross-Attention Hyper-Adapter} to probe intermediate spatial features and synthesize instance-conditioned low-rank routing bases and residual directions. Each spatial token then assembles its own residual update via dense signed dot-product affinities over the generated rank-wise components, avoiding external prompts, static expert banks, and discrete Top- selection. The resulting assembly rule also admits a linear-attention perspective, making its dense token-wise routing behavior transparent. Experiments on AIO-3, AIO-5, and CDD-11 show that CEA improves average restoration quality over strong prompt-, descriptor-, and expert-based baselines, with the clearest gains on spatially varying and compositional degradations, while maintaining favorable parameter, FLOP, and runtime efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续专家组装（CEA），通过实例条件低秩残差实现全合一图像恢复，无需测试时退化标签。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实图像退化未知、空间非均匀且组合多样，现有方法依赖全局提示或静态专家路由，难以适应局部退化模式。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用测试时退化标签的情况下，让单一模型适应多样化的局部退化模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 紧凑全局条件会瓶颈局部退化证据，静态专家路由可能产生同质更新或依赖不稳定稀疏分配。
analysis.method: CEA使用轻量级交叉注意力超适配器探测中间空间特征，合成实例条件低秩路由基和残差方向，每个空间token通过密集点积亲和度组装残差更新。
contributions: 提出连续专家组装（CEA）框架，实现token级动态参数化。
引入交叉注意力超适配器，避免外部提示、静态专家库和离散Top-k选择。
从线性注意力视角解释密集token级路由行为，提升透明度。
analysis.experiments: 在AIO-3、AIO-5和CDD-11数据集上，CEA在平均恢复质量上优于强基线，尤其在空间变化和组合退化上增益明显，且保持参数、FLOP和运行时效率。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂退化场景泛化能力有限。
交叉注意力超适配器可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续专家组装（CEA），通过实例条件低秩残差实现全合一图像恢复，无需测试时退化标签。

papers.title: Pest-Thinker: Learning to Think and Reason like Entomologists via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Pest-induced crop losses pose a major threat to global food security and sustainable agricultural development. While recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for visual understanding and smart agriculture, their direct application to pest recognition remains limited due to the domain's unique challenges such as high inter-species complexity, intra-species variability, and the scarcity of expert-annotated data. In this work, we introduce Pest-Thinker, a knowledge-driven reinforcement learning (RL) framework that enables MLLMs to reason over fine-grained pest morphology. We first construct two high-definition pest benchmarks, QFSD and AgriInsect, comprising diverse species and expert-annotated morphological traits. Leveraging these datasets, we synthesize Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning trajectories to facilitate structured learning of pest-specific visual cues through Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Subsequently, we employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a novel feature reward that guides the model to focus on observable morphological evidence, assessed by an LLM-as-a-Judge strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Pest-Thinker substantially improves both in-domain and out-of-domain morphological understanding, marking a step toward expert-level visual reasoning for intelligent agricultural pest analysis. The datasets and source code are available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Pest-Thinker 框架，通过强化学习让多模态大模型像昆虫学家一样推理细粒度害虫形态。
analysis.research_motivation: 害虫导致的作物损失威胁全球粮食安全，现有 MLLM 在害虫识别上因种间复杂度高、种内变异大、专家标注数据稀缺而表现有限。
analysis.problem: 如何让 MLLM 具备细粒度害虫形态推理能力，实现专家级的视觉理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建两个高清害虫基准数据集 QFSD 和 AgriInsect，合成 CoT 推理轨迹进行 SFT，再使用 GRPO 结合特征奖励（LLM-as-a-Judge 评估）引导模型关注形态证据。
contributions: 提出 Pest-Thinker 知识驱动强化学习框架，提升 MLLM 细粒度害虫形态推理能力。
构建两个高清害虫基准数据集 QFSD 和 AgriInsect，包含多样物种和专家标注形态特征。
设计基于 GRPO 的特征奖励机制，结合 LLM-as-a-Judge 策略，显著改善域内和域外形态理解。
analysis.experiments: 在 QFSD 和 AgriInsect 数据集上进行实验，显示 Pest-Thinker 在域内和域外形态理解上均有显著提升。

papers.title: Dynamic Pondering Sparsity-aware Mixture-of-Experts Transformer for Event Stream based Visual Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Despite significant progress, RGB-based trackers remain vulnerable to challenging imaging conditions, such as low illumination and fast motion. Event cameras offer a promising alternative by asynchronously capturing pixel-wise brightness changes, providing high dynamic range and high temporal resolution. However, existing event-based trackers often neglect the intrinsic spatial sparsity and temporal density of event data, while relying on a single fixed temporal-window sampling strategy that is suboptimal under varying motion dynamics. In this paper, we propose an event sparsity-aware tracking framework that explicitly models event-density variations across multiple temporal scales. Specifically, the proposed framework progressively injects sparse, medium-density, and dense event search regions into a three-stage Vision Transformer backbone, enabling hierarchical multi-density feature learning. Furthermore, we introduce a sparsity-aware Mixture-of-Experts module to encourage expert specialization under different sparsity patterns, and design a dynamic pondering strategy to adaptively adjust the inference depth according to tracking difficulty. Extensive experiments on FE240hz, COESOT, and EventVOT demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves a favorable trade-off between tracking accuracy and computational efficiency. The source code will be released on this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出动态稀疏感知MoE Transformer，利用多密度事件表示实现高效视觉目标跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB跟踪器在低光照、快速运动等挑战场景下易失效，事件相机虽具高动态范围和高时间分辨率优势，但现有事件跟踪器未充分利用事件数据的空间稀疏性和时间密度特性，且固定时间窗口采样策略难以适应运动动态变化。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模事件数据在不同时间尺度上的密度变化，并设计自适应推理机制以平衡跟踪精度与计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事件数据具有内在的空间稀疏性和时间密度变化，单一固定时间窗口采样策略在运动动态变化下表现次优。
analysis.method: 提出事件稀疏感知跟踪框架，包含三阶段Vision Transformer骨干网络逐步注入稀疏、中等密度和密集事件搜索区域，实现层次化多密度特征学习；引入稀疏感知混合专家模块促进专家在不同稀疏模式下的专业化；设计动态思考策略根据跟踪难度自适应调整推理深度。
contributions: 首次显式建模事件密度变化，提出多尺度事件密度特征学习框架。
提出稀疏感知MoE模块和动态推理深度调整策略，实现精度-效率权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在FE240hz、COESOT和EventVOT数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提方法在跟踪精度和计算效率之间取得了有利的权衡。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏或密集事件场景的泛化性有限。
动态推理策略的额外开销未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态稀疏感知MoE Transformer，利用多密度事件表示实现高效视觉目标跟踪。

papers.title: Metonymy in vision models undermines attention-based interpretability
papers.abstract: Part-based reasoning is a classical strategy to make a computer vision model directly focus on the object parts that are relevant to the downstream task. In the context of deep learning, this also serves to improve by-design interpretability, often by using part-centric attention mechanisms on top of a latent image representation provided by a standard, black-box model. This approach is based on a locality assumption: that the latent representation of an object part encodes primarily information about the corresponding image region. In this work, we test this basic assumption, measuring intra-object leakage in vision models using part-based attribute annotations. Through a comprehensive experimental evaluation, we show that modern pretrained vision transformers violate the locality assumption and exhibit a strong intra-object leakage, in which each part encodes information from the whole object, a visual metonymy that compromises the faithfulness of attention-based interpretable-by-design methods for part-based reasoning, ultimately rendering them uninterpretable. In addition, we establish an upper bound using a two-stage approach that prevents leakage by design. We then show that this inherently disentangled feature extraction improves attribute-driven part discovery on a variety of tasks, confirming the practical impact of intra-object leakage. Our results uncover a neglected issue affecting the interpretability of part-based representations, such as those in CBMs relying on part-centric concepts, highlighting that two-stage approaches offer a promising way to mitigate it.

analysis.tldr: 现代视觉Transformer中对象内部信息泄漏导致基于注意力的可解释性失效。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于部件的推理是提升计算机视觉模型可解释性的经典策略，但现有方法依赖局部性假设，即部件隐表示主要编码对应图像区域的信息。该假设是否成立缺乏验证，若被违反将严重损害可解释性。
analysis.problem: 验证视觉模型中是否存在对象内部信息泄漏（即部件编码了整体对象信息），并评估其对基于注意力的可解释性方法的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现现代预训练视觉Transformer严重违反局部性假设，表现出强烈的对象内部泄漏，每个部件编码了来自整个对象的信息，这种视觉转喻现象导致基于注意力的可解释方法失效。
analysis.method: 通过部件级属性标注测量对象内部泄漏；提出一种两阶段方法（先提取解耦特征再发现部件）作为上界，从设计上防止泄漏。
contributions: 首次系统验证了视觉Transformer中对象内部泄漏现象，揭示其对基于注意力的可解释性的危害。
提出两阶段方法作为上界，证明解耦特征提取能改善属性驱动的部件发现，并验证了泄漏的实际影响。
analysis.experiments: 在多个部件属性标注数据集上进行综合实验，对比了现代预训练ViT与两阶段方法，显示泄漏普遍存在且两阶段方法有效。
limitations: 仅针对视觉Transformer，未覆盖其他架构（如CNN）。
两阶段方法可能增加计算开销，实际部署需权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 现代视觉Transformer中对象内部信息泄漏导致基于注意力的可解释性失效。

papers.title: VISD: Enhancing Video Reasoning via Structured Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: Training VideoLLMs for complex reasoning remains challenging due to sparse sequence level rewards and the lack of fine grained credit assignment over long, temporally grounded reasoning trajectories. While reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) provides reliable supervision, it fails to capture token level contributions, leading to inefficient learning. Conversely, existing self distillation methods offer dense supervision but lack structure and diagnostic specificity, and often interact unstably with reinforcement learning. In this work, we propose VISD, a structured self distillation framework that introduces diagnostically meaningful privileged information for video reasoning. VISD employs a video aware judge model to decompose reasoning quality into multiple dimensions, including answer correctness, logical consistency, and spatio-temporal grounding, and uses this structured feedback to guide a teacher policy for token level supervision. To stably integrate dense supervision with RL, we introduce a direction magnitude decoupling mechanism, where rollout level advantages computed from rewards determine update direction, while structured privileged signals modulate token level update magnitudes. This design enables semantically aligned and fine grained credit assignment, improving both reasoning faithfulness and training efficiency. Additionally, VISD incorporates curriculum scheduling and EMA based teacher stabilization to support robust optimization over long video sequences. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that VISD consistently outperforms strong baselines, improving answer accuracy and spatio temporal grounding quality. Notably, VISD reaches these gains with nearly 2x faster convergence in optimization steps, highlighting the effectiveness of structured self supervision in improving both performance and sample efficiency for VideoLLMs.

analysis.tldr: VISD通过结构化自蒸馏框架，利用视频感知裁判模型分解推理质量维度，结合方向-幅度解耦机制，提升VideoLLM的推理准确性和训练效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大模型（VideoLLM）的复杂推理训练面临稀疏序列奖励和细粒度信用分配不足的问题，现有强化学习缺乏token级贡献，自蒸馏方法缺乏结构性和诊断特异性，且与强化学习结合不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何为视频推理提供结构化的、诊断性的密集监督信号，并稳定地与强化学习结合，实现细粒度信用分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VISD框架，包含视频感知裁判模型（分解推理质量为答案正确性、逻辑一致性、时空定位等维度）、教师策略生成token级监督、方向-幅度解耦机制（rollout优势决定方向，结构化信号调节幅度）、课程调度和EMA教师稳定化。
contributions: 提出结构化自蒸馏框架VISD，利用多维诊断性特权信息指导视频推理训练。
引入方向-幅度解耦机制，稳定融合密集监督与强化学习，实现语义对齐的细粒度信用分配。
在多个基准上显著提升答案准确性和时空定位质量，收敛速度提升近2倍。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上对比强基线，VISD在答案准确性和时空定位质量上持续领先，且优化步骤收敛速度提升近2倍。
limitations: 依赖视频感知裁判模型的质量，可能引入额外偏差。
框架复杂度较高，需要多维度分解和课程调度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VISD通过结构化自蒸馏框架，利用视频感知裁判模型分解推理质量维度，结合方向-幅度解耦机制，提升VideoLLM的推理准确性和训练效率。

papers.title: Boosting Self-Supervised Tracking with Contextual Prompts and Noise Learning
papers.abstract: Learning robust contextual knowledge from unlabeled videos is essential for advancing self-supervised tracking. However, conventional self-supervised trackers lack effective context modeling, while existing context association methods based on non-semantic queries struggle to adapt to unlabeled tracking scenarios, making it difficult to learn reliable contextual cues. In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised tracking framework, named \textbf{\tracker}, which introduces a dual-modal context association mechanism that jointly leverages fine-grained semantic prompts and contextual noise to drive the model toward learning robust tracking representations. Adherent to the easy-to-hard learning principle, our contextual association mechanism operates based on two stages. During early training, instance patch tokens (prompts) are assigned to both forward and backward tracking branches to facilitate the acquisition of tracking knowledge. As training progresses, contextual noise is gradually injected into the model to perturb feature, encouraging the tracker to learn robust tracking representations in a more complex feature space. Thus, this novel contextual association mechanism enables our self-supervised model to learn high-quality tracking representations from unlabeled videos, while being applied exclusively during training to preserve efficient inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method.

analysis.tldr: 提出双模态上下文关联机制，结合语义提示和噪声学习提升自监督跟踪性能。

papers.title: OpenGaFF: Open-Vocabulary Gaussian Feature Field with Codebook Attention
papers.abstract: Understanding open-vocabulary 3D scenes with Gaussian-based representations remains challenging due to fragmented and spatially inconsistent semantic predictions across multi-view observations. In this paper, we present OpenGaFF, a novel framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built upon 3D Gaussian Splatting. At the core of our method is a Gaussian Feature Field that models semantics as a continuous function of Gaussian geometry and appearance. By explicitly conditioning semantic predictions on geometric structure, this formulation strengthens the coupling between geometry and semantics, leading to improved spatial coherence across similar structures in 3D space. To further enforce object-level semantic consistency, we introduce a structured codebook that serves as a set of shared semantic primitives. Furthermore, a codebook-guided attention mechanism is proposed to retrieve language features via similarity matching between query embeddings and learned codebook entries, enabling robust open-vocabulary reasoning while reducing intra-object feature variance. Extensive experiments on standard 2D and 3D open-vocabulary benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior approaches, achieving improved segmentation quality, stronger 3D semantic consistency and a semantically interpretable codebook that provides insight into the learned representation.

analysis.tldr: OpenGaFF 通过高斯特征场和码本注意力机制实现开放词汇 3D 场景理解，提升语义一致性和分割质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于高斯的开放词汇 3D 场景理解面临多视图语义预测碎片化和空间不一致的问题，现有方法缺乏几何与语义的强耦合。
analysis.problem: 如何在高斯表示中实现几何与语义的紧密耦合，并保证对象级语义一致性，以支持开放词汇 3D 场景理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多视图观测下语义预测碎片化且空间不一致，几何与语义耦合弱导致相似结构语义不一致。
analysis.method: 构建高斯特征场，将语义建模为高斯几何和外观的连续函数；引入结构化码本作为共享语义基元，并通过码本引导注意力机制检索语言特征。
contributions: 提出高斯特征场，显式将语义条件于几何结构，增强几何-语义耦合。
引入结构化码本和码本引导注意力，实现对象级语义一致性和开放词汇推理。
analysis.experiments: 在标准 2D 和 3D 开放词汇基准上实验，方法持续优于先前方法，实现更好的分割质量和 3D 语义一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量 3D 高斯初始化。
码本大小和注意力机制的计算开销未讨论。

papers.title: LARGO: Low-Rank Hypernetwork for Handling Missing Modalities
papers.abstract: Addressing missing modalities is an important challenge in multimodal image analysis and often relies on complex architectures that do not transfer easily to different datasets without architectural modifications or hyperparameter tuning. While most existing methods tackle this problem in feature space by engineering representations that are robust to missing inputs, we instead operate in weight space. We propose LARGO, a hypernetwork that compresses the $2^N-1$ dedicated missing-modality models into a single network by modelling the convolutional weights using the Canonical Polyadic (CP) tensor decomposition. Extensive experimental validation on BraTS 2018 (4 modalities, 15 scenarios) and ISLES 2022 (3 modalities, 7 scenarios) shows that our method ranks first in 47 out of 52 configurations, achieving average Dice improvements of +0.68$\%$ and +2.53$\%$ over state-of-the-art baselines (mmFormer, M$^{3}$AE, ShaSpec, SimMLM). A proof-of-concept experiment on avMNIST suggests that LARGO may extend beyond medical imaging to heterogeneous non-medical modalities.

analysis.tldr: 提出低秩超网络LARGO，通过CP分解压缩缺失模态专用模型，在医学图像分割中取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态图像分析中缺失模态是常见挑战，现有方法依赖复杂架构且难以跨数据集迁移，缺乏在权重空间处理缺失模态的通用方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改架构或超参数的情况下，用一个统一网络处理所有可能的缺失模态组合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LARGO超网络，利用Canonical Polyadic (CP)张量分解将2^N-1个缺失模态专用模型的卷积权重压缩为单一网络。
contributions: 首次在权重空间通过超网络和CP分解处理缺失模态，避免特征工程。
在BraTS 2018和ISLES 2022上52个配置中47个排名第一，平均Dice提升0.68%和2.53%。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS 2018（4模态，15场景）和ISLES 2022（3模态，7场景）上验证，与mmFormer、M³AE、ShaSpec、SimMLM对比，并在avMNIST上展示泛化性。
limitations: 仅验证了医学图像分割任务，其他模态和任务需进一步测试。
超网络可能增加训练复杂度，且CP分解的秩选择需要调参。

papers.title: AMIEOD: Adaptive Multi-Experts Image Enhancement for Object Detection in Low-Illumination Scenes
papers.abstract: In multimedia application scenarios, images captured under low-illumination conditions often lead to lower accuracy in visual perception tasks compared to those taken in well-lit environments. To tackle this challenge, we propose AMIEOD, an image enhancement-enabled object detection framework for low-illumination scenes, where the two tasks are jointly optimized in a detection performance-oriented manner. Specifically, to fully exploit the information in poorly lit images, a Multi-Experts Image Enhancement Module (MEIEM) is proposed, which leverages diverse enhancement strategies. On this basis, aiming to better align the MEIEM with the detection task, we propose a Detection-Guided Regression Loss (DGRL) that utilizes the detection result to decide the regression target. Moreover, to dynamically select the most suitable enhancement strategy from MEIEM during inference, we construct an Expert Selection Module (ESM) guided by the proposed Detection-Guided Cross-Entropy (DGCE) loss, which formulates the optimization of ESM as a classification task. The improved method is well-matched with current detection algorithms to improve their performance in dim scenes. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that the proposed method significantly improves object detection accuracy in low-illumination conditions. Our code has been released at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向低照度场景的检测导向多专家图像增强框架，通过联合优化增强与检测任务提升目标检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 低照度图像在多媒体应用中导致视觉感知任务精度下降，现有增强方法未与检测任务联合优化，难以最大化检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种检测性能导向的图像增强方法，使其能自适应地选择最优增强策略并联合优化增强与检测任务，以提升低照度场景下的目标检测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AMIEOD框架，包含多专家图像增强模块（MEIEM）生成多种增强策略，检测引导回归损失（DGRL）利用检测结果指导回归目标，以及专家选择模块（ESM）通过检测引导交叉熵损失（DGCE）动态选择最优增强策略。
contributions: 提出检测导向的多专家图像增强框架AMIEOD，联合优化增强与检测任务。
设计检测引导回归损失（DGRL）和检测引导交叉熵损失（DGCE），实现增强与检测的协同优化。
构建专家选择模块（ESM），在推理时动态选择最合适的增强策略。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明该方法显著提升了低照度条件下的目标检测精度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定检测算法，泛化性需进一步验证。
多专家模块可能增加计算开销，实时性待评估。

papers.title: Revisiting Uncertainty: On Evidential Learning for Partially Relevant Video Retrieval
papers.abstract: Partially relevant video retrieval aims to retrieve untrimmed videos using text queries that describe only partial content. However, the inherent asymmetry between brief queries and rich video content inevitably introduces uncertainty into the retrieval process. In this setting, vague queries often induce semantic ambiguity across videos, a challenge that is further exacerbated by the sparse temporal supervision within videos, which fails to provide sufficient matching evidence. To address this, we propose Holmes, a hierarchical evidential learning framework that aggregates multi-granular cross-modal evidence to quantify and model uncertainty explicitly. At the inter-video level, similarity scores are interpreted as evidential support and modeled via a Dirichlet distribution. Based on the proposed three-fold principle, we perform fine-grained query identification, which then guides query-adaptive calibrated learning. At the intra-video level, to accumulate denser evidence, we formulate a soft query-clip alignment via flexible optimal transport with an adaptive dustbin, which alleviates sparse temporal supervision while suppressing spurious local responses. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Holmes outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化证据学习框架 Holmes，通过显式建模不确定性提升部分相关视频检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 部分相关视频检索中，简短查询与丰富视频内容之间的不对称性导致不确定性，现有方法缺乏对不确定性的显式建模。
analysis.problem: 解决部分相关视频检索中因查询模糊和时序监督稀疏导致的语义歧义和匹配证据不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模糊查询在视频间引入语义歧义，且稀疏的时序监督无法提供充分匹配证据。
analysis.method: 提出 Holmes 层次化证据学习框架：视频间层将相似度解释为证据支持并用狄利克雷分布建模，基于三原则进行细粒度查询识别和查询自适应校准学习；视频内层通过带自适应垃圾箱的柔性最优传输实现软查询-片段对齐，积累更密集证据并抑制虚假局部响应。
contributions: 提出层次化证据学习框架 Holmes，显式建模部分相关视频检索中的不确定性。
设计视频间层的三原则查询识别和查询自适应校准学习，以及视频内层的软对齐机制。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及 Holmes 优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的三原则，泛化性需验证。
最优传输计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化证据学习框架 Holmes，通过显式建模不确定性提升部分相关视频检索性能。
